dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: Agent adhered closely to provided governance rules and constraints, demonstrating strong compliance with architectural standards.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: Identified key cause-effect relationships in system components, though some downstream impacts were not fully explored.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: Successfully surfaced trade-offs between scalability and complexity, proposing balanced resolution strategies.
